design_rule: 디버프=적색/어두운 계열 배경 틴트, 버프=청색/밝은 계열 배경 틴트

statuses.desc: green skull with dripping poison drops, toxic bubbles

sd.prompt: (masterpiece:1.3), (best quality:1.2), 2D pixel art game icon, 64x64 pixel RPG status effect icon, dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style, debuff status icon, green skull with dripping poison drops, toxic bubbles, dominant color #00CC00, centered composition, (clean pixel edges:1.4), (2px black outline:1.3), no anti-aliasing, 3-step cel shading, transparent background, game UI status icon, <lora:pixel-art-style-v2:0.7>, <lora:custom-aeterna-v1:0.8>
